channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Spain's World Cup Win Celebrations Turn Trafic As Teen Dies In Fountain Collapse

media:content.media:description: The fountain collapsed under the weight of numerous people who had climbed onto it

item.description: Overcrowded fountain collapses during midnight soccer celebrations, killing a 13-year-old boy and injuring several others.
item.content:encoded: Overcrowded fountain collapses during midnight soccer celebrations, killing a 13-year-old boy and injuring several others.

item.title: Inside The Secret CIA Mission That Cleared UAE's Path To Advanced AI Chips

media:content.media:description: A senior CIA officer was sent to Abu Dhabi to assess one of the country's most powerful leaders (File)

item.description: Jonny Gannon's mission reportedly went beyond intelligence gathering and became part of a larger effort to reshape US-UAE AI ties.
item.content:encoded: Jonny Gannon's mission reportedly went beyond intelligence gathering and became part of a larger effort to reshape US-UAE AI ties.

item.title: Trump Mum On Iran Plans As US Military Death Count Rises To 17 In War

media:content.media:description: Trump acknowledged the fallen soldiers while speaking to reporters Sunday

item.description: Secret B-2 bomber videos and covert tanker movements hint at a major looming escalation while Trump publicly stalls.
item.content:encoded: Secret B-2 bomber videos and covert tanker movements hint at a major looming escalation while Trump publicly stalls.

item.title: 'Waiting For Their Arrival': Iran's Big Warning Against US Ground Invasion

media:content.media:description: Iran's Foreign Ministry warned that US forces will face the repercussions

item.description: US President Trump has repeatedly mused about ramping up American efforts, including potentially attempting to seize Kharg Island.
item.content:encoded: US President Trump has repeatedly mused about ramping up American efforts, including potentially attempting to seize Kharg Island.

item.title: Indian Envoy Meets 'Distressed' Women Workers In Oman, Assures Help

media:content.media:description: The embassy said it provides free boarding and lodging facilities to distressed workers.

item.description: The embassy's outreach comes amid recurring reports of abuse, exploitation and non-payment of wages involving Indian women domestic workers in Oman and other Gulf countries.
item.content:encoded: The embassy's outreach comes amid recurring reports of abuse, exploitation and non-payment of wages involving Indian women domestic workers in Oman and other Gulf countries.

item.title: Team Trump Explores New Deportation Path In 'Alien Terrorist Removal' Court

media:content.media:description: The proceedings under the court are set in two stages: one private and the other public.

item.description: If the Trump administration wins this case, it could set up a new precedent of removing people it links to terrorism while keeping much of its evidence secret.
item.content:encoded: If the Trump administration wins this case, it could set up a new precedent of removing people it links to terrorism while keeping much of its evidence secret.

item.title: New Air Force One To Be "Maxed Out" Amid Security Concerns: Donald Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump took his first flight on the retrofitted Boeing 747-8 plane on July 1.

item.description: President Trump grounds vulnerable new Qatari-gifted jet for a month-long security overhaul following anti-missile defense gaps.
item.content:encoded: President Trump grounds vulnerable new Qatari-gifted jet for a month-long security overhaul following anti-missile defense gaps.

item.title: 200 Made-In-India Coaches To Give Boost To Bangladesh Railways

media:content.media:description: Bangladesh Railway will receive 200 new coaches from India.

item.description: Bangladesh will import 200 broad-gauge railway coaches from India by December 2027 under a Rs 915 crore deal.
item.content:encoded: Bangladesh will import 200 broad-gauge railway coaches from India by December 2027 under a Rs 915 crore deal.

item.title: Canada Defies UN Advice, Bans Visitors From Congo Amid Ebola Outbreak

media:content.media:description: The UN health agency said travel restrictions create stigma

item.description: The ban contravenes advice from the World Health Organization, which advises against travel or trade restrictions with Congo, where officials are currently struggling to contain a large outbreak of Ebola.
item.content:encoded: The ban contravenes advice from the World Health Organization, which advises against travel or trade restrictions with Congo, where officials are currently struggling to contain a large outbreak of Ebola.

item.title: Tate Brothers Arrested On Rape, Trafficking Charges: A Look At Their Controversies

media:content.media:description: Tate brothers are facing several criminal investigations in the UK and Romania

item.description: Andrew Tate, 39, now faces 42 charges, while Tristan Tate, 38, faces 17.
item.content:encoded: Andrew Tate, 39, now faces 42 charges, while Tristan Tate, 38, faces 17.

item.title: Pakistan Turns To Terror Playbook Amid Taliban Troubles, Crisis In PoK

media:content.media:description: The multi front crisis has exposed the limits of Pakistan's security-first approach

item.description: Beijing has reportedly shared its concerns about the vulnerability of their personnel and projects at the highest levels in Pakistan, putting Army Chief Munir under serious pressure to deliver results.
item.content:encoded: Beijing has reportedly shared its concerns about the vulnerability of their personnel and projects at the highest levels in Pakistan, putting Army Chief Munir under serious pressure to deliver results.

item.title: US Immigration Agents To Wear Body Cameras During Vehicle Stops

media:content.media:description: Tom Homan stated ICE officers must now wear body cameras after deadly traffic stops

item.description: ICE will require officers to wear body cameras during vehicle stops after two fatal shootings in Texas and Maine sparked public backlash
item.content:encoded: ICE will require officers to wear body cameras during vehicle stops after two fatal shootings in Texas and Maine sparked public backlash

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: US Conducts Strikes On Iran For 9th Straight Night After Another Soldier Killed

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News LIVE: The US-Iran tensions have escalated in recent days

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: CENTCOM said the raids were designed to "swiftly punish Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps forces who launched attacks against American service members in Jordan last night."
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: CENTCOM said the raids were designed to "swiftly punish Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps forces who launched attacks against American service members in Jordan last night."

item.title: JD Vance, Wife Usha Welcome Fourth Child Alec Neel Vance

media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance and Second Lady Usha Vance welcomed their fourth son, Alec

item.description: The birth also marked a rare event in American political history. The last vice-president known to have had a child while serving in office was Schuyler Colfax. His son, Schuyler Colfax III, was born in 1870.
item.content:encoded: The birth also marked a rare event in American political history. The last vice-president known to have had a child while serving in office was Schuyler Colfax. His son, Schuyler Colfax III, was born in 1870.

item.title: Samsung Cuts Hundreds Of US Jobs, Offers Relocation Amid Headquarters Shift

media:content.media:description: Details about the job losses at SEA have not previously been reported.

item.description: As AI demand drives record chip profits, surging component costs squeeze Samsung's phone and TV units, forcing a massive US workforce pivot to Texas.
item.content:encoded: As AI demand drives record chip profits, surging component costs squeeze Samsung's phone and TV units, forcing a massive US workforce pivot to Texas.

item.title: Pregnant Woman In US Names Baby After Surgeon Who Saved Her Life Following Brain Cancer Battle

media:content.media:description: Representative Image

item.description: She recalled that she kept thinking about her children and believed she would not see them grow up.
item.content:encoded: She recalled that she kept thinking about her children and believed she would not see them grow up.

item.title: 'Might Be Last Call To Family': Iran's Araghchi Recalls Talks With Team Trump

media:content.media:description: Araghchi said that despite the constant threats, Tehran refused to back down.

item.description: Araghchi also rejected Washington's claims that Iran could be forced into submission through military pressure. He drew comparisons with Venezuela, where the US forced regime change with the capture of President Nicolas Maduro during a military operation in January.
item.content:encoded: Araghchi also rejected Washington's claims that Iran could be forced into submission through military pressure. He drew comparisons with Venezuela, where the US forced regime change with the capture of President Nicolas Maduro during a military operation in January.

item.title: Pledging To 'Rewire Britain', 'King of North' Andy Burnham Becomes UK PM

media:content.media:description: Burnham's first hurdle will be the appointment of his cabinet team

item.description: Andy Burnham, 56, faces a long list of problems, from Britain's underperforming utilities to anaemic economic growth, and must first unveil his top team of ministers - already the subject of much debate in the governing Labour Party.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham, 56, faces a long list of problems, from Britain's underperforming utilities to anaemic economic growth, and must first unveil his top team of ministers - already the subject of much debate in the governing Labour Party.

item.title: Meet Sally, AI-Powered Humanoid Robot To Help Teach High School Students In New York

media:content.media:description: The district says the robot will work as a teaching assistant alongside educators.

item.description: Costing about $57,600, Sally has a lifelike appearance with silicone skin, long brown hair, and movable arms and hands.
item.content:encoded: Costing about $57,600, Sally has a lifelike appearance with silicone skin, long brown hair, and movable arms and hands.

item.title: Another American Soldier Killed In US-Iran War, Was Detonating Iranian Drone

media:content.media:description: Iraq death follows the killing of two US service members in Jordan. (Representational)

item.description: The soldier's death on Saturday brings the confirmed number of American military fatalities since the war began on 28 February to 17.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1130101/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The soldier's death on Saturday brings the confirmed number of American military fatalities since the war began on 28 February to 17.
